headline: Truist Financial (TFC) Joins Defensive Indexes, Is The Stock Still Undervalued?
summary: Truist Financial (TFC) has just been added to the Russell 1000 Defensive and Russell 1000 Value Defensive Indexes, putting the regional bank on the radar of investors who follow defensive equity benchmarks. See our latest analysis for Truist Financial. At a share price of $51.42, Truist Financial has moved higher in recent months, with a 30 day share price return of 4.51% and a 90 day share price return of 7.51%.
